LanguageData.CYSIB_Settings_ModEnabled: Enable Can't You See I'm Busy
LanguageData.CYSIB_Settings_Header: Controls how fast each need decays during combat. 0% = frozen, 100% = normal speed.
LanguageData.CYSIB_Settings_Disabled: Mod disabled — all combat effects are inactive.
LanguageData.CYSIB_Settings_SliderTooltip: At {1}%, {0} decays at that speed during combat.
LanguageData.CYSIB_Settings_BlockBreakdowns_Tooltip: When enabled, colonists in combat will not have mental breaks. Need decay is unaffected by this setting.
LanguageData.CYSIB_Settings_AllowCubeBreaks_Tooltip: When enabled, colonists with Cube addiction can still have Cube sculpting breaks during combat, even if mental break blocking is on.
LanguageData.CYSIB_Settings_FreezeCaravanNeeds_Toolti: When enabled, colonist needs are frozen while forming a caravan. Mental break blocking (if enabled) also applies during caravan formation.
